subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-15 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I regard the people of Paris even as bees or ants, coming and going in clusters, surging to and fro like a wave
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهالی پاریس را مثل زنبور و موری می‌بینم که فوج فوج میآیند و میروند و مانند موج در حرکت
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
